name: Lotus Cap
summary: The Lotus Cap is the centerpiece of the Lotus vaporising system, uniting flame-powered performance with artisan craftsmanship.
description: The Lotus Cap is the centerpiece of the Lotus vaporising system, uniting flame-powered performance with artisan craftsmanship. Made from premium wood and durable metal, this essential component ensures smooth, flavorful vapour with every session—ideal as a replacement or spare part for existing Lotus users. Featuring the signature Lotus hot plate design, the cap delivers quick and even heat distribution without combustion. A simple torch flame activates efficient convection-style heating, unlocking full flavour while protecting herbal integrity. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.

specs.label: Material
specs.value: Olive wood or Amaranth handle, heat-resistant metal hot plate

specs.label: Compatibility
specs.value: Lotus Gentleman Pipe, Lotus Water Pipe Adapter, other Lotus bases
